title: FMD: Building Compliance Into Your QMS
alt: Checklist of five Falsified Medicines Directive controls for quality teams

items.label: Map your markets
items.desc: Document per product whether GB or NI rules apply; keep under change control

items.label: Validate serialisation chain
items.desc: Treat scanning and decommissioning as validated systems with audit trails

items.label: Define suspect-product workflow
items.desc: Broken seal or failed check triggers quarantine, investigation, reporting

items.label: Govern your suppliers
items.desc: Re-verify bona fides on a risk-based cycle, not just at onboarding

items.label: Apply ICH Q9 & Q10
items.desc: Risk-based verification with change control and management review
